title: My Friend Stitch
description: This is just a small mod which adds Stitch, from Lilo & Stitch, and now you can tame Stitch with a new item, jam.
body:
ENG: This is just a small mod which adds Stitch, from Lilo & Stitch, and now you can tame Stitch with a new item, jam.

ESP: Esto solo es un mod pequeño que agrega a Stitch, de Lilo y Stitch, y ahora puede ser domesticado usando un nuevo objeto, mermelada.
